title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports receiving 'invalid credentials' error even after password reset. Account seems locked after multiple attempts.

title: Payment deducted but order failed
description: User attempted to purchase premium subscription. Amount deducted from bank but order shows as failed on platform.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Application crashes immediately after splash screen on Android device. User has cleared cache but issue persists.

title: Request refund for duplicate charge
description: Customer was charged twice for the same order. Requests immediate refund for the duplicate transaction.

title: Cannot reset password
description: User not receiving password reset email. Checked spam folder. Needs manual reset or alternative verification method.

title: Two-factor authentication not working
description: User not receiving SMS with 2FA code. Unable to complete login process. Has verified phone number is correct.

title: Order status not updating
description: Order placed three days ago still shows 'processing'. Customer concerned about delivery delay.

title: Error when uploading profile picture
description: User gets 'file format not supported' error when uploading JPG image. File size is within limits.

title: Mobile app slow performance
description: App takes 30+ seconds to load any page. User on latest version with good internet connection.

title: Invoice not generated for order
description: Customer completed payment but invoice is not available in downloads section. Needs invoice for reimbursement.

title: Cannot apply promo code
description: Promo code WELCOME20 shows as invalid despite being unused and within validity period.

title: Session timeout too aggressive
description: User gets logged out after only 2 minutes of inactivity. Needs longer session duration.

title: Search functionality broken
description: Search returns no results for products that are clearly available when browsing manually.

title: Email notifications not received
description: User not receiving any order confirmation or shipping updates. Has checked spam folders.

title: Gift card balance missing
description: User added $50 gift card but balance shows $0. Receipt shows successful activation.
